nd.t:
北达科地
[医] 钕(60号元素)
nd.d:
n a yellow trivalent metallic element of the rare earth group; occurs in monazite and bastnasite in association with cerium and lanthanum and praseodymium
n a state of north central United States bordering on Canada

nda.t: abbr. non-disclosure agreement 保密协议; nondestructive analysis 非破坏性分析; nondestructive assay 非破坏性化验; new drug application 新药申请

ndas.t: abbr. New Dictionary of American Slang <新美国俚语辞典>

ndb.t: abbr. new domestic boiler 新民用锅炉; new donkey boiler 新辅助锅炉; national development bond(ing) 国家发展债券; non directional beacon 非定向灯塔

nddo.t: [化] 忽略双原子微分重叠法

nde.t: [医][=near-death experience]濒死体验, 临近死亡经历

ndea.t: abbr. National Defense Education Act <美>国防教育法

ndebele.t: n. 恩德贝勒语；恩德贝勒人

ndembu.t: [网络] 恩登布人；恩丹布；恩敦布人

ndes.t: (nde 的复数)  [医][=near-death experience]濒死体验, 临近死亡经历

ndf.t: [医][=neutrophil diffraction factor]嗜中性粒（白）细胞衍生因子

ndg.t: abbr. nedenfor (Dano-Norwegian=beneath) （丹麦-挪威语）在…之下

ndi.t: abbr. numerical designation index 数字标准指数

ndic.t: abbr. Nuclear Data Information Center <美>(ORNL)核数据情报中心

ndjamena.t: 恩贾梅纳[乍得首都](旧称拉密堡)
ndjamena.d: n the capital and largest city of Chad; located in the southwestern on the Shari river

ndl.t: abbr. network definition language 网络定义语言; niederlndisch (German=Netherlandic) （德语）荷兰语

ndn.t: [计]= New Data Network,新数据网络

ndo.t: abbr. negotiable delivery order 议付交货单

ndola.t: 恩多拉[赞比亚中北部城市]

ndop.t: abbr. n-decyl, n-octyl phthalate 邻苯二甲酸正癸辛酯

ndos.t: (ndo 的复数) abbr. negotiable delivery order 议付交货单

ndp.t: abbr. 国内生产净值（Net Domestic Product）；（加拿大）新民主党（New Democratic Party）；三磷酸核苷（nucleoside diphospate）

nds.t: [计] 域名系统, 域名服务程序, NetWare目录服务
nds.d:
n a yellow trivalent metallic element of the rare earth group; occurs in monazite and bastnasite in association with cerium and lanthanum and praseodymium
n a state of north central United States bordering on Canada

ndt.t: [计] 网络描述表, 网络诊断工具, 非破坏性测试

ndugu.t: <斯瓦希里> n.大哥(在非洲坦桑尼亚用作称呼)

ndx.t: n. DOS文件扩展名:索引文件
